title: AI Toolbox Error Codes
description: Schema for .agent/contracts/error-codes.json — the canonical error class registry. Every script that emits structured errors must use a code defined here.

version.description: Schema version of the error registry itself. Bump when the structure changes.

codes.description: Map of error code identifiers to their definitions.

exit_code.description: Process exit code. Must be 10 or higher to avoid colliding with conventional success/warning exits used elsewhere (0/1/2).

category.description: Top-level category for grouping in dashboards and logs.

description.description: One-sentence human description used in error messages.

fix_template.description: Template for the suggested fix. May reference $1, $2 placeholders filled in by the emitting script.

since.description: AI Toolbox version this code was introduced in.
